1ec457c8-6064-44fb-91fc-1bea98e9e39c.message: We often only know the results of the casting "at the last moment", so it is not possible to let everyone know who they did not choose. We will inform those who are shortlisted or confirmed. Keep the dates open until the day of the costume rehearsal or shoot, if no one hears back, it means you failed. Thank you for your understanding.

37dc3db8-1705-4a7e-83a8-675806963340.message: How does it work in Poppy casting?

37f7a6cf-6e2d-4512-a549-da264b47c3b4.message: Is your child fearless? Isn't he too fixated on his mother to handle being close to her or in the arms of an actress? Naturally, everything changes very quickly with babies, so it is difficult to predict how the child will behave, but if you know that the child cries when looking at a stranger who speaks to him, he is most likely not a suitable adept for casting.
37f7a6cf-6e2d-4512-a549-da264b47c3b4.description: Q&A page - answer to question 1 - paragraph 2 - part 2

37ff75cc-75cb-477a-96d3-57aa24c7797e.description: Above the top menu - photos retake

3ea3bde4-c556-4b30-83af-3d54c089085e.message: Can't. We only register in person on the listed dates, where we take a picture of the child to get an idea of ​​whether he is not shy, whether he communicates, how he affects us, what his speaking and acting skills are, and his charisma.
3ea3bde4-c556-4b30-83af-3d54c089085e.description: Q&A page - answer to question 4 - paragraph 1

3eb465a6-5dad-4d6c-b6be-527f9d410057.message: What is the fee, how much do castings cost?

3f670b27-213d-45e8-a589-d0d7cba9a881.message: Children 4+: Rehearse a performance on camera with your child where he says his name, where he comes from, age and what his interests, skills, hobbies or acting experience are. The intro is part of every casting. This can be followed by an acting action, which the director explains to the child and the child plays it, or there is some easy improvisation. Acting castings require studying the text in advance, but most ordinary advertising castings do not have a more specific task for the child in advance, so that he reacts as naturally as possible.
3f670b27-213d-45e8-a589-d0d7cba9a881.description: Q&A page - answer to question 10 - paragraph 3

400e454f-61d8-464f-a2da-da354065e16a.description: Q&A page - answer to question 11 - paragraph 2

45d926b1-7a58-4115-8848-a2356582480e.message: It may happen that there is a casting or filming while the children are at school, sometimes it is necessary to release the child from school or not to participate in the casting. It is not possible to request a change in the time of the casting. The on-site escort does not necessarily have to be a legal representative, just a grandmother, aunt, etc.
45d926b1-7a58-4115-8848-a2356582480e.description: Q&A page - answer to question 10 - paragraph 4

48fd1715-5ac5-468d-912b-6922976fe647.message: Is your child communicative, does he like to show off? Aren't they shy in front of the camera and strangers? Will he cooperate and will he enjoy acting out scenes at the casting? Is it typically interesting, something distinctive? Does he have acting training, experience? Does he enjoy drama, is he interested in acting? If you answered yes at least a few times, join us.
48fd1715-5ac5-468d-912b-6922976fe647.description: Q&A page - answer to question 1 - paragraph 1

4de90d79-5e91-4f18-bbbe-cb91ac7d8eee.message: It is not, so you can be registered in other agencies, however, when registering, you sign the condition that if you receive the same offer from us, as well as from another agency (and it doesn't matter if from us on Tuesday, but from another agency, for example already on Monday), you will enter Poppycasting in the form at the casting.

6c7da4cc-bca0-4e57-a1e3-adb11872c1aa.message: Several children can meet at the casting at the same time, sometimes you wait an hour, other times you are gone in 10 minutes, unfortunately we cannot predict in advance.

da168ad3-466d-4890-a90b-0d37fb483349.message: Castings are held exclusively in Prague and mean commuting, because it is necessary to bypass several auditions in order for the child to succeed in getting something. Casting can have a 1st round and a 2nd round (so-called callback for a shortlist from the 1st round), then a costume rehearsal, sometimes an acting rehearsal, then a shooting date. But they usually choose babies only from photos without casting.
da168ad3-466d-4890-a90b-0d37fb483349.description: Q&A page - answer to question 3 - paragraph 1
